title: 2048 Puzzle
description: The viral sliding tile numbers game where you merge tile numbers to reach the ultimate master block: 2048!
instructions: Place blocks with identical numbers adjacent to each other. Slide them in four directions to merge values together and double their scores until you manifest the mythical 2048 block.

title: Hextris Arcade
description: Fast-paced, colorful rotational hexagon match puzzle inspired by Tetris. Clear rows by spinning matching colors.
instructions: Rotate the central hexagon to catch falling colored bars. Place three bars of the same color side-by-side to clear them and prevent the stack from overflowing past outer boundaries.
controls: Left & Right Arrow Keys - Spin Hexagon
A & D Keys - Alternative spin controls
Click/Tap edges - Spin left or right

title: Google Pac-Man
description: The legendary classic arcade maze game originally developed by Google as an interactive celebratory doodle.
instructions: Navigate Pac-man through the grid, eating all public dots to progress. Avoid the four ghostly pursuers - Blinky, Pinky, Inky, and Clyde. Eat glowing power pellets to temporarily turn the tables on your ghostly trackers!
controls: Swipe on screen - Steer on Mobile

title: Retro Snake
description: The quintessential arcade retro game of speed. Guide your snake, eat red food nodes, and grow without striking walls or yourself.
instructions: Steer the snake gracefully around the quadrant sandbox. Each food pellet digested elongates your structural tail. Crashing into the arena grid bounds or biting your own tail resets your journey.

title: A Dark Room
description: Minimalist text-based clicker mystery RPG. Stoke the fire, explore the wilderness, and build a thriving survival settlement.
instructions: Begin by kindling the cold fireplace in a dark room. Gather crucial timber, invite lone wanderers, construct a settlement, and systematically expand your operational supply routes into the uncharted outer wastes.
controls: Left Mouse Click - Interact and Select

title: Floppy Bird
description: Challenging retro-styled flapper simulator. Synchronize gravity pulses to dodge the endless rows of emerald pipeline columns.
instructions: Leap forward with precise taps to adjust altitude. Fly centered through green pipes to score. Each crash immediately brings your bird back to solid earth.
controls: Space Bar / Left Click / Screen Tap - Flap Wings

title: HexGL Racer
description: A high-speed futuristic hovercraft racing prototype made in WebGL. Experience cyber-speed and test your reaction times.
instructions: Navigate your slick anti-gravity racing machine down technical cyber trails. Collect speed rings, dodge wall scrapings, and complete three laps to set absolute records.
controls: Left & Right Arrows / A, D - Steering

title: Tic-Tac-Toe Pro
description: A lightweight tactical tic-tac-toe game with simple AI levels and clean grid displays. Great for rapid focus breaks.
instructions: Take turns placing your X or O grids on the 3x3 plane. Aligning three identical characters vertically, horizontally, or diagonally seals a solid round win against dynamic opponents.
controls: Left Click / Screen Touch - Place Symbol
